series_metadata.series_description: Records include As-Built drawings, construction documentation, reports, construction certifications, and Ground Water Monitoring Reports associated with Final Permits to Install

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep until the related facility is closed, the records are superceded, or the records are no longer of vaue to the Division as technical reference to verify construction requirements were met and additional design criteria were properly installed. Review/update annually ; Electronic: Keep until the related facility is closed, the records are superceded, or the records are no longer of vaue to the Division as technical reference to verify construction requirements were met and additional design criteria were properly installed. Review/update annually, Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
